articles.title: Round1 Opens Third New Jersey Location
articles.summary: The Japanese FEC giant opened a new venue at Menlo Park Mall, featuring bowling, arcade games, and karaoke. This expansion signals continued growth in the US market for entertainment-focused concepts.

articles.title: AI-Powered Dynamic Pricing Boosts FEC Revenue by 22%
articles.summary: A new study shows that FECs using AI-driven dynamic pricing see an average revenue increase of 22%. The technology adjusts attraction prices based on demand, time of day, and seasonal patterns.

articles.title: New VR Attraction Combines Physical and Digital Play
articles.summary: A startup has launched a hybrid VR experience that combines physical obstacle courses with immersive digital environments, creating a new category of attractions for family entertainment centers.

articles.title: IAAPA Releases 2026 Safety Guidelines Update
articles.summary: The International Association of Amusement Parks and Attractions has released updated safety guidelines for indoor entertainment centers, with new standards for trampolines, climbing walls, and go-karts.

articles.title: Retro Arcade Aesthetic Drives Gen Z Foot Traffic
articles.summary: FECs embracing retro neon aesthetics and classic arcade games are seeing a 35% increase in Gen Z visitors. The nostalgic design trend combines well with modern social media sharing.

articles.title: Indoor Go-Kart Market to Reach $2.8B by 2028
articles.summary: Market analysts project the indoor go-kart industry will grow to $2.8 billion by 2028, driven by electric kart adoption and increased demand for premium racing experiences.
